ops.text: Exemplar index switched to VOYAGE (user directive): EMBED_MODEL voyage-4-large (verified current best via docs/blog — Voyage 4 MoE family, beats voyage-3-large, 32K ctx, 1024-dim default), massively parallel batching a la bioqa (voyageai AsyncClient max_retries=3, 256-text/240K-char batches under anyio Semaphore(16)); full 3,153-exemplar index embeds in ~13s vs 30+min local MPS. Local sentence-transformers path kept for offline models (LOCAL_EMBED_MODEL). Query side: VoyageQueryEncoder (input_type=query; docs embedded with input_type=document) via query_encoder() dispatch by model-name prefix — daemon wired through it. MAX_EMBED_CHARS raised 8k->16k (32K-ctx headroom). Key: VOYAGE_API_KEY env or ~/.cc-steer/.env via python-dotenv (user directive: no manual parsing); repo .env copied to ~/.cc-steer/.env for launchd/daemon runs. Gotcha: Voyage rejects empty inputs — exemplar_text now returns None for empty renderings (steers with no context turns are ineligible, semantically right). Old Qwen3-Embedding rows deleted. Retrieval smoke: sensible neighbors. voyageai+python-dotenv in embed extra.
